message:
fix(clippy): Address pedantic/nursery warnings in streaming, mock, injection

- src/trace/streaming.rs: Add Copy to ReplayCheckpoint, allow
  cast_precision_loss for progress percentage calculations
- src/transport/mock.rs: Allow option_if_let_else for clearer transport(),
  useless_let_if_seq due to early return, significant_drop_tightening
- src/lab/instrumented_future.rs: Allow needless_pass_by_value for API
  design flexibility

Reduces clippy warning count from 140 to 131.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
